== Notes for [[Item:Q57904|Q57904]] ==

"'''México, Distrito Federal, registros parroquiales y diocesanos, 1514-1970'''", database with images, FamilySearch (https://familysearch.org/ark:/61903/1:1:N8YY-676 : 28 July 2015), Francisco Alfonsso de Sossa in entry for Agustin de Sossa, 1617. ... Name: '''Agustin de Sossa'''; Event Type: '''Baptism'''; Event Date: '''05 Sep 1617'''; Event Place: '''Asunción Sagrario Metropolitano (Centro), , Distrito Federal, Mexico'''; Gender: Male; Father's Name: Francisco Alfonsso de Sossa; Mother's Name: Luyssa de Ribera Aberdano

See a '''photograph of Agustín's original Baptism Record''' in his profile's "Media/Documents" section.

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
67051ADCE871C1EFBBFA9822EF79916C3F9C
geni:6000000068141757821

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
